name: Potato Filling
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cheddar Cheese (shredded) or 1 cup Dry Bryndzia (sheep's milk cheese)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and quarter the potatoes, cover with water, and cook until soft.
2. Meanwhile, chop the onions and cook in melted butter until golden brown.
3. Drain the potatoes and shred the cheddar cheese or crumble the bryndzia.
4. Add the cooked onions, shredded cheese, salt, and pepper to the potatoes, blending well.
5. Allow the mixture to cool, stirring occasionally.
6. Store the filling in the refrigerator for several days. Do not freeze.
NOTE:
Leftovers may be used to make breakfast cakes or a filling for potato boats or stuffed green peppers.
